entry.title: Re: Memories of the Newtown Square Campus
entry.content: NIce your story!

entry.title: Re: Remembering a Friend
entry.content: Well-deserved tribute; thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Hello World.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am a data analyst with 3 years of experience in project and resource management in an IT/MNC. I am also a student current pursuing my MBA in Human Resource Management and exploring jobs in Talent Industry.

In the process of learning about talent industry, I understand that more than theoretical knowledge, job roles require hands-on experience of the skill, HCM in my case, in a valued platform.

When I came across SAP's Digital skills intitative, I decided to grab the opportunity to explore more on one of the Niche skills and have started SAP HCM learning journey. 

I am glad i stumbled upon this Initiative : )  

Thanks for the great learning opportunity, Team.

entry.title: Re: How do we create a variable on WEBI that calculates if the patients do the same labs within 60 d
entry.content: The DaysBetween function will calculate the days between the first patinet and second patients which is not what I look for. What I want is to calculate the number of days between 2 labs for the same patients

entry.title: Re: Table for available budget for project in SAP
entry.content: There's more than one way to get this. The easiest way is to check in the RPSCO table, which is the same one that the S_ALR_87013558 report uses.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am a women, who have worked as a ERP consultant for around 2 years. However, my current experience is all about Oracle, and I would love to grab details about SAP to upgrade myself. I know the requirements for SAP integration of enterprises are huge, so it will be great if I could improve my knowledge of this field to help better the contribution to my company.

It would be highly appreciated if I receive the free attempt of SAP examination.

Sincerely,

Nancy

entry.title: Re: Element "timestamp" is not available in my ABAP CDS V...
entry.content:
if your system is not that old, you should use cdc for delta

timestamp based delta is obsolete.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/cds-based-data-extraction-part-ii-delta-handling/ba-p/13425761

entry.title: PSM Funds Management Closing Operations
entry.content:
Hi All

I am working on Budgeting in Funds Management. In the closing operations we have FMDM -Closing Operations Monitor. Here Carry fwd budget for commitments is disallowed                     ( Screenshot). My project requires to carry forward of budget for commitments to next year. How I can make it allowed. 

Please let me know

entry.title: Re: TDS U/S 194 Q
entry.content:
TDS Rule 194 sec.

 TDS is deducted at 10% under section 194 if the dividend amount is more than 5000 in a year.

entry.title: Carry forward of Residual Budget to next year
entry.content:
Hi 

I want to carryover residual budget to next year. I execute Tcode FMMPCOVRN for this. Every time I run this it shows error like -Release and Budget amounts are inconsistent or the Budget amount is not sufficient for the release. I also tried with Budget with automatic release.  Please let me know how to resolve the issue

entry.title: Meetup Fortaleza 2024
entry.content:
SIT 2024 alignment.
Presentation of Ideas and Planning for the next SITFOR in 2025.

SAP consultants and the community are invited at 7 pm 

JP Steak House | Restaurante, Rodízio - Fortaleza

entry.title: Re: How to Add Fiscal Year Variants in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Verena_Stuetz,

what about companies that need to have a 4+4+5 period variant in a group with companies that report in K4 in the same tenant?

According to the documentation rules its not possible, because the start and end day of the periods don't match. 

Is this an impossible scenario, or am i reading something wrong?

Thanks,

Sandra Correia

entry.title: Re: How to update custom field info at item level of cont...
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi

I've the Custom fields coming from the Condition table(I'm not sure about full configuration as one of the Functional has done it) in the WCOCO tcode under the Conditions tab at the bottom in the alv fields. 

Now when the User clicks on the Save button, I want my custom field to be updated based on one of the header field. Could you please help me with this request?

I've seen couple of BADIs under the ENHS WCB_CC but not able to figure out the right one and right way to implement this, Your input is valuable.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

What an amazing initiative!

Thanks for giving us the great opportunity to obtain Digital skills.

entry.title: B1i Message log don't show any B1 message
entry.content:
Hi guys, I am a total new bird to B1i.  Recently I got a weird issue that I can find the event log  on the "B1 Event Monitor" but no logs  on the "message logs". I am quite sure that I have set up a simple scenario  to handle these messages. And only B1 to B1i has this issue, the message log works for the third-party integration.

When I check the event log on the "B1 Event Monitor" and we can see the "source company" field is "SRT03517.XXX", however the host name value in SLD is "SRT03517.company.com". (SRT03517 should be my B1 server)

I'm not sure if that's the mismatch that's causing the problem.  Also I noticed that there is always a synchronization action inside the queue, I'm not sure what this is for.

My question is anyone knows where the "source company" field comes from? And could you give me a guide to correct the field? 

Really thanks!
